description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single stage named report and jobs that extend the .run template. Add a community-contribution-report job in the report stage that runs only when the $COMMUNITY_CONTRIBUTION_REPORT variable is set and sets TRIAGE_POLICY_FILE to policies/stages/report/community-contribution-report.yml. Add a customer-bugs-without-severity job in the report stage that runs only when the $CUSTOMER_BUGS_WITHOUT_SEVERITY variable is present and sets TRIAGE_POLICY_FILE to policies/stages/report/customer-bugs-without-severity.yml. Add a missing-categories job in the report stage that triggers when $TRIAGE_MISSING_CATEGORIES is set and sets TRIAGE_POLICY_FILE to policies/stages/report/missing-categories.yml. Finally, add runner-saas-team-summary and runner-team-summary jobs in the report stage that trigger on $TRIAGE_RUNNER_SAAS_GROUP_SUMMARY and $TRIAGE_RUNNER_GROUP_SUMMARY respectively, each setting TRIAGE_POLICY_FILE to their corresponding policies/teams YAML files.
